executives.name: Deborah McCoy
executives.background: Retired Senior Vice President, Flight Operations, Continental Airlines, Inc. She served in this role from 1999 until 2005.

executives.background: President of Emerald Creek Group, LLC and former Chairman and CEO of Continental Airlines, Inc.

executives.name: Lisa Flavin
executives.background: Lisa Flavin is Senior Vice President and Chief Compliance Officer. She joined Emerson in 1998 and has served in her current role since 2011.
